title: Home Renovation 房屋装修
scene: 和装修承包商讨论装修方案

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: I want to renovate my kitchen and bathroom. Can you give me an estimate?
lines.cn: 我想装修厨房和浴室。你能给我个报价吗？

lines.speaker: Contractor
lines.content: Sure. Do you have a design in mind, or do you need our designer to help?
lines.cn: 当然。你有设计想法吗，还是需要我们设计师帮忙？

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: I have some ideas from Pinterest. I want modern cabinets and a walk-in shower.
lines.cn: 我在Pinterest上有些想法。我想要现代橱柜和一个步入式淋浴间。

lines.speaker: Contractor
lines.content: That sounds nice. Based on your ideas, the estimate would be around twenty thousand dollars.
lines.cn: 听起来不错。根据你的想法，估价大约是两万美元。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: That is more than I expected. Can we use cheaper materials without losing quality?
lines.cn: 比我想象的高。我们能不能用便宜一点的材料但质量不打折？

lines.speaker: Contractor
lines.content: Yes, we can suggest some mid-range brands. That could save you about three thousand dollars.
lines.cn: 可以，我们可以推荐一些中等价位的品牌。那样能帮你省大概三千美元。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: How long will the renovation take? I need to plan where to stay.
lines.cn: 装修要多长时间？我需要安排住的地方。

lines.speaker: Contractor
lines.content: It should take about six weeks. We can start next Monday if you approve the plan.
lines.cn: 大约需要六周。如果你同意方案，我们可以下周一开工。

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.content: Okay, let me think about it tonight. Can I call you tomorrow?
lines.cn: 好的，我今晚考虑一下。明天给你打电话可以吗？

lines.speaker: Contractor
lines.content: Of course. Take your time. I will send you the detailed plan by email this evening.
lines.cn: 当然。慢慢来。我今晚会把详细方案发邮件给你。
